case_title: SF TOWN TAXI INC. VS. JOSE VICENTE MENA

docket_entries.description: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,621.07 FILED BY SF TOWN TAXI INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MENA, JOSE VICENTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
